name: Coconut Delight Candy Bars
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup Candied fruit (chopped, cherries and pineapple)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, combine corn syrup, salt, water, and sugar. Cover tightly and bring to a boil.
2. Remove the lid and place a candy thermometer inside. Cook until the temperature reaches 236°F (112°C).
3. Place coconut, candied fruit, raisins, and pecans in a large bowl and mix well.
4. Pour the cooked syrup over the fruit and nuts; mix thoroughly.
5. Pour the mixture out onto a buttered marble slab and pack into a square shape that is 3/8 inch thick.
6. Cool and slice into bar shapes.
7. Dip each bar in sweet chocolate.
Makes about 60 bars.
